title: DCE-SPO-2025-001: Delta Crown Hub Setup
description: Phase 2 Week 1 - Primary brand-specific hub creation for Delta Crown Extensions. Hub-per-brand architecture implementation including site provisioning and initial configuration.

title: DCE-SPO-2025-001: Security & Permissions Configuration
description: Phase 3 Week 2 - Implement security groups, permission inheritance, and access controls for Delta Crown SharePoint sites and Teams.

title: R2.2: Implement Compensating Security Controls
description:
Remediation Task - Critical Priority

Issue: Scripts lack adequate security controls for production deployment

Required Controls:
- Input validation and sanitization
- Output encoding for all dynamic content
- Session management and timeout handling
- Audit logging for all admin operations
- Rate limiting for API calls
- Exception handling that does not leak sensitive info

Scripts Affected:
- Phase 2.1 (Corp Hub)
- Phase 2.2 (DCE Hub)
- Phase 2.3 (Azure AD)
- Phase 2.4 (Verification)

BLOCKS: Production deployment
PRIORITY: P0 - Critical

title: DCE-SPO-2025-001: End-to-End Testing
description: Phase 4 Testing - Comprehensive testing of SharePoint hub-spoke architecture, Teams integration, security controls, and user workflows before production launch.

title: R2.1: Fix Authentication - Certificate-Based Auth
description:
Remediation Task - Critical Priority

Issue: Scripts currently use Basic/Windows authentication which is insufficient for production

Required Fix:
- Implement certificate-based authentication
- Add certificate management and validation
- Support for managed identity where applicable
- Secure credential storage (Azure Key Vault integration)

Scripts Affected:
- Phase 2.1 (Corp Hub)
- Phase 2.2 (DCE Hub)  
- Phase 2.3 (Azure AD)
- Phase 2.4 (Verification)

BLOCKS: All Phase 2 script execution
PRIORITY: P0 - Critical

title: R2.3: Fix Code Quality Issues
description:
Remediation Task - High Priority

Issue: Code quality issues identified during review

Required Fixes:
- Remove hardcoded values (parameterize all configs)
- Add comprehensive error handling
- Implement proper logging (structured, leveled)
- Add code comments and documentation
- Standardize naming conventions
- Fix magic numbers and strings
- Add type hints/strong typing where applicable

Scripts Affected:
- Phase 2.1 (Corp Hub)
- Phase 2.2 (DCE Hub)
- Phase 2.3 (Azure AD)
- Phase 2.4 (Verification)

BLOCKS: Production deployment
PRIORITY: P1 - High

title: R2.4: Add Rollback Mechanisms
description:
Remediation Task - High Priority

Issue: Scripts lack rollback capability for failed deployments

Required Implementation:
- Pre-deployment state capture
- Rollback scripts for each provisioning step
- Transaction-like behavior (all-or-nothing)
- Recovery procedures documentation
- Test rollback scenarios
- Idempotent operations where possible
- Backup/restore capabilities for critical configurations

Scripts Affected:
- Phase 2.1 (Corp Hub)
- Phase 2.2 (DCE Hub)
- Phase 2.3 (Azure AD)
- Phase 2.4 (Verification)

BLOCKS: Production deployment
PRIORITY: P1 - High
